positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a stylized astronaut floating above a gentle crescent moon and Earth horizon, rendered in a clean, high-contrast mid-century modern aesthetic. The astronaut suit features geometric patterns and primary color accents (deep navy blue, burnt orange, and cream). The scene composition is balanced, with the astronaut centrally placed and facing outward. Use limited color palette with deep shadows and bright, ethereal highlights. The overall mood is whimsical, optimistic, and retro-futuristic. Perfect for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, low resolution, poorly drawn, artifacts, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, copyright, logo
